title: The Courthouse Comes Into View
description: Luffy charges ahead through Enies Lobby, aiming straight for Robin while the rest of the group fights to keep up.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Luffy charges ahead through Enies Lobby, aiming straight for Robin while the rest of the group fights to keep up.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Since 100 more went down just now.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Captain!! Rob Lucci and company are here.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The two gates should be open now!!

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: Hey Sogeking, I wanted to ask about...

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: How to Use this Cold Air Rod...

dialogue.speaker: Sogeking
dialogue.text: We'll go one at a time...

dialogue.speaker: Enies Lobby guard
dialogue.text: I don't know. Don't ask me!!

summary: Luffy charges ahead through Enies Lobby, aiming straight for Robin while the rest of the group fights to keep up.
